name: GOLFTEC Southeast Portland
about: GOLFTEC is a golf training and fitting center that utilizes advanced motion measurement technology and launch monitors for instruction. Their service combines personalized coaching with data-driven analysis using high-speed cameras and specialized software to identify swing issues and guide players through improvement plans. The company offers comprehensive packages including lessons, practice memberships, and professional club fittings designed to optimize performance and equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using OPTIMOTION motion tracking and launch monitors
Professional club fitting with certified fitters and equipment from top brands
Access to advanced technology for detailed swing and performance analysis
Structured improvement plans and coach-designed training programs

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for launch monitor data and fitting services

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides equipment for lessons and fittings. Their club fitting service helps match you with custom-fit clubs from top brands.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned on-site. It appears to be a focused training facility without on-site dining options.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify simulation times, but sessions typically include personalized coaching and swing analysis which would depend on the specific package purchased.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is suitable for youth golfers, though specific age guidelines aren't detailed on the website.
